title: A Memorable Sightseeing Trip to London
passage:
The capital of the U.K. is one of my favorite cities in the world. I started my London journey with a visit to the Tower of London. It is the site of many key historical events. I arrived as soon as the Tower of London opened, which was around 9 a.m. There was a lot to see and I spent the whole morning there.

Coming out of the Tower of London, I found myself right next to the iconic(标志性的) Tower Bridge. I had already learnt about its history, including how it was built. I had also learnt how the lifting mechanism worked to allow ships through. I experienced the Glass Floor, a high-level walkway of the bridge. It was so exciting!

Then I went on to the Houses of Parliament by London underground. Before going inside for a visit, I took a lot of photos from the outside of this beautiful building. Tomorrow I am going to get a map of London and have fun simply walking around the city.

questions.prompt: When did the writer get to the Tower of London?
How did the writer get to the Houses of Parliament?
What did the writer do before he entered the Houses of Parliament?
options: He took photos from the outside.

questions.prompt: What's your favorite city in the world? Why? Write 20 words or more.

blocks.text: My favorite city in the world is London because of its rich history.
Because I want to visit the iconic Tower Bridge and experience the exciting Glass Floor.
It would be an amazing adventure to walk around the city with a map.
The writer arrived at the Tower of London around 9 a.m.
He took a lot of photos from the outside.
He spent the whole morning at the Tower of London.
